Meta.Title: ACL 2026 Conference Trip in San Diego
Meta.Summary: 3-day conference itinerary focused on the main ACL activities.

POI.name: Tutorial Session
POI.description: Attend ACL tutorial sessions on day 1.

POI.name: Keynote Session 1
POI.description: Attend the first keynote session on core ACL conference themes and emerging NLP directions.

POI.name: In Person Oral
POI.description: Join in-person oral presentations featuring accepted conference papers and live Q&A.

POI.name: Coffee Break
POI.description: Take a quick coffee and snack break to recharge between conference sessions.

POI.name: In Person Poster
POI.description: Explore in-person poster sessions and discuss conference research contributions with authors.

POI.name: San Diego City Tour
POI.description: City tour around San Diego after conference activities.

POI.name: Dinner at Mitch's Seafood
POI.description: Dinner at Mitch's Seafood in San Diego.
